image.long_summary: Pop star Zara Larsson is the internet’s newest “it” girl. After a wave of viral hits, including her latest album’s title track, “Midnight Sun,” and her feature on PinkPantheress’s “Stateside” remix, the Swedish singer cemented herself as the next big thing in pop music. But fame doesn’t come without controversy, as Larsson learned when she revealed to her fan base that she uses generative AI . The discourse began when Larsson posted about watching AI-generated content on TikTok . She first reposted an image from the account Ai Fruit Stories , a page posting AI animations of—you guessed it—drama between anthropomorphic foods. Larsson then posted a selfie with the caption: “Sorry I can’t hang out today, I gotta see what’s happening with choclatina and strawberto,” referring to that page’s main storyline: a chocolate bar named Chocolatina who’s seducing a strawberry named Strawberto. image.long_summary: Jasmine Mithani Technology Reporter Published 2026-03-17 16:34 4:34 March 17, 2026 pm America/Chicago Republish this story Share Bluesky Facebook Email Republish this story On Monday, three girls filed a class-action lawsuit against xAI alleging that the company’s Grok AI tool was used to generate child sexual abuse material from their photos. This new civil case joins at least two others revolving around nonconsensual deepfakes filed against xAI, which was founded by billionaire Elon Musk. Those earlier cases are centered around nonconsensual deepfakes posted on X, the social media platform also owned by Musk, while this new complaint involves a third-party app that relied on Grok AI to make images. Grok image generation debuted on X in December , and immediately users found ways to generate sexually explicit images despite nudity being banned. Grok generated over 4.4 million images over nine days , per a review by The New York Times, and 1.8 million of those were sexualized depictions of women. Researchers at the nonprofit Center for Countering Digital Hate estimated Grok made 23,000 sexualized images of children over 11 days. The 19th thanks our sponsors. Become one . While some users created images of themselves, many of the images were of people who had no idea they were being digitally undressed on social media. So far the three lawsuits are the only path forward for justice for the thousands, if not millions, of people who have been victimized in this way by Grok. Fede

image.long_summary:
L'OCR reste un défi technique majeur pour les documents réels, loin des images propres des démonstrations. GLM-OCR, développé par Zhipu AI, combine vision et langage pour traiter tables, formules et structures sans surconsommation de ressources.

Points clés :
• Modèle compact de 0,9 milliard de paramètres
• Capacité à traiter documents complexes, tables et formules
• Approche multimodale pour une extraction structurée efficace

Conclusion sur les implications : GLM-OCR pourrait redéfinir les standards de l'OCR en combinant performance et efficacité énergétique.

Why Document OCR Still Remains a Hard Engineering Problem? What does it take to make OCR useful for real documents instead of clean demo images? image.summary_en: A March 11 political agreement on AI Act amendments will add an explicit prohibition on non-consensual intimate AI-generated images, direct fallout from the Grok scandal. It took a scandal, a wave of
image.long_summary:
Les législateurs européens ont ajouté une interdiction explicite des deepfakes intimes générés par l'IA sans consentement.

Points clés :
• La mesure suit le scandale Grok et une pression réglementaire accrue
• 57 membres du Parlement européen ont soutenu l'amendement
• L'UE renforce sa position de leader en matière de régulation de l'IA

Cette interdiction marque un tournant dans la lutte contre les abus des technologies génératives.
image.long_summary_en:
A March 11 political agreement on AI Act amendments will add an explicit prohibition on non-consensual intimate AI-generated images, direct fallout from the Grok scandal. It took a scandal, a wave of regulatory anger, and a coalition of 57 European Parliament members to get there,  but the EU’s landmark AI Act will now contain an […]

image.title: L'assistant IA de Photoshop peut éditer vos photos à votre place
image.title_en: Photoshop's AI Assistant Can Edit Photos for You, if You Want That
image.summary: L'IA de Photoshop simplifie l'édition d'images en automatisant les modifications. Une révolution pour les créatifs.
image.summary_en: The AI assistant can help you navigate Photoshop and make changes for you.
image.long_summary:
Adobe intègre une IA avancée dans Photoshop pour assister les utilisateurs dans l'édition d'images.

Points clés :
• L'assistant IA guide les utilisateurs et applique des modifications automatiques
• Basé sur des modèles de langage et du machine learning pour comprendre les demandes
• Une avancée majeure dans l'accessibilité des outils créatifs

Cette innovation pourrait démocratiser l'édition photo professionnelle, mais soulève des questions sur la créativité humaine.
image.long_summary_en: The AI assistant can help you navigate Photoshop and make changes for you.

image.title: Google cède aux plaintes des utilisateurs et modifie sa fonctionnalité 'Ask Photos'
image.title_en: Google gives in to users’ complaints over AI-powered ‘Ask Photos’ search feature
image.summary: Google ajoute une option pour désactiver la recherche par IA dans Photos, répondant aux critiques des utilisateurs.
image.summary_en: The option appears on the Google Photos Search screen and lets users pick which experience they want.
image.long_summary:
Face aux critiques, Google permet désormais aux utilisateurs de choisir entre la recherche classique et l'IA dans Photos.

Points clés :
• Google intègre une option de désactivation de l'IA dans Photos
• Réponse aux plaintes sur l'intrusion de l'IA dans les services grand public
• Nouvelle tendance : personnalisation des expériences IA

Cette décision reflète l'équilibre croissant entre innovation et respect des préférences utilisateur.
image.long_summary_en: The option appears on the Google Photos Search screen and lets users pick which experience they want.

That’s the full extent of what’s explicitly stated. What we can’t conclude from this: We don’t have details on editing timelines, render durations, or output resolution. If you feel like the world's out of control right now and full of AI bullshit, just wait for what's coming. I'll admit, they're catching me more often lately on social media – newsreel-style videos, dancing Donalds, Michael Jordan saying stuff that Michael Jordan never said, influencers that never existed. I'd pride myself on being reasonably savvy, but the telltale signs of what's generated and what's real are starting to blur. And as a reeling world struggles to get to grips with that, here comes the next salvo: real-time AI-generated video. Runway has teamed up with Nvidia to present an as-yet-unnamed video model that's under 100 milliseconds from prompt to first frame. The blink of an eye takes between 100-400 ms, for reference. Executive Summary This report provides a comprehensive, in-depth comparison of the pricing models for four leading AI chatbot/service APIs, updated as of February 2026: X.AI’s Grok (the AI platform developed by Elon Musk’s xAI in partnership with the X platform), Google’s Gemini, OpenAI’s ChatGPT (AI services based on GPT language models), and Anthropic’s Claude. Pricing for these services is primarily usage-based (per token) and varies widely. For example, xAI’s Grok 4.1 models charge only $0.20 per 1 million input tokens and $0.50 per 1 million output tokens ( [1] ), whereas OpenAI’s flagship GPT-5.2 is priced at $1.75 per 1 M input and $14.00 per 1 M output tokens. Google’s Gemini 3.1 Pro leads the current generation at $2.00 input and $12.00 output (per million), while Gemini 3 Flash offers a budget option at $0.50/$3.00 . Anthropic’s Claude flagship Claude Opus 4.6 costs $5.00 input and $25.00 output per million tokens. Its mid-tier Sonnet 4.6 is $3/$15 (input/output) per million, and Haiku 4.5 is $1/$5 . audio.title: BuzzFeed lance un studio créatif pour redonner du fun à l'Internet grâce à l'IA
audio.title_en: BuzzFeed's New Spinoff Is a 'Creative Studio' Trying to Make the Internet Fun Again
audio.summary: BuzzFeed mise sur l'IA pour innover comme Nintendo, avec des contenus surprenants et engageants.
audio.summary_en: Founder Jonah Peretti said at SXSW that the goal is to follow Nintendo's model of creating surprising new things with existing tech.
audio.long_summary:
Jonah Peretti, fondateur de BuzzFeed, a annoncé lors du SXSW un nouveau studio créatif utilisant l'IA pour redynamiser le web.

Points clés :
• BuzzFeed s'inspire du modèle Nintendo pour créer des contenus innovants avec l'IA.
• L'entreprise mise sur les LLMs et l'AI générative pour produire des expériences uniques.
• Cette initiative pourrait influencer les géants comme OpenAI, Google et Anthropic dans la course à la créativité.

Cette approche pourrait redéfinir l'engagement des utilisateurs sur les plateformes numériques.
audio.long_summary_en: Founder Jonah Peretti said at SXSW that the goal is to follow Nintendo's model of creating surprising new things with existing tech.
